resume.description: Determines the waiting mode to use before the workflow continues

timeInterval.description: Waits for a certain amount of time

specificTime.description: Waits until a specific date and time to continue

webhook.description: Waits for a webhook call before continuing

form.description: Waits for a form submission before continuing

incomingAuthentication.description: If and how incoming resume-webhook-requests to $execution.resumeUrl should be authenticated for additional security

dateTime.description: The date and time to wait for before continuing

unit.description: The time unit of the Wait Amount value

webhookNotice.displayName: The webhook URL will be generated at run time. It can be referenced with the $execution.resumeUrl variable. Send it somewhere before getting to this node. More info

formNotice.displayName: The form url will be generated at run time. It can be referenced with the $execution.resumeFormUrl variable. Send it somewhere before getting to this node. More info

formTitle.description: Shown at the top of the form

formDescription.description: Shown underneath the Form Title. Can be used to prompt the user on how to complete the form. Accepts HTML. Does not accept <script>, <style> or <input> tags.
formDescription.placeholder: e.g. We'll get back to you soon

fieldName.description: The name of the field, used in input attributes and referenced by the workflow

fieldLabel.description: Label that appears above the input field

fieldType.description: The type of field to add to the form

elementName.description: Optional field. It can be used to include the html in the output.

placeholder.description: Sample text to display inside the field

defaultValue.description: Default value(s) that will be pre-selected. Must match one or multiple of the option labels. Separate multiple pre-selected options with a comma.

fieldValue.description: Input value can be set here or will be passed as a query parameter via Field Name if no value is set

multiselectLegacyNotice.displayName: Multiple Choice is a legacy option, please use Checkboxes or Radio Buttons field type instead

multiselect.description: Whether to allow the user to select multiple options from the dropdown list

html.description: HTML elements to display on the form page

multipleFiles.description: Whether to allow the user to select multiple files from the file input or just one

acceptFileTypes.description: Comma-separated list of allowed file extensions

formatDate.displayName: The displayed date is formatted based on the locale of the user's browser

requiredField.description: Whether to require the user to enter a value for this field before submitting the form

fieldName.description: The name of the field, used in input attributes and referenced by the workflow

fieldLabel.description: Label that appears above the input field

fieldType.description: The type of field to add to the form

elementName.description: Optional field. It can be used to include the html in the output.

placeholder.description: Sample text to display inside the field

defaultValue.description: Default value(s) that will be pre-selected. Must match one or multiple of the option labels. Separate multiple pre-selected options with a comma.

fieldValue.description: Input value can be set here or will be passed as a query parameter via Field Name if no value is set

multiselectLegacyNotice.displayName: Multiple Choice is a legacy option, please use Checkboxes or Radio Buttons field type instead

multiselect.description: Whether to allow the user to select multiple options from the dropdown list

html.description: HTML elements to display on the form page

multipleFiles.description: Whether to allow the user to select multiple files from the file input or just one

acceptFileTypes.description: Comma-separated list of allowed file extensions

formatDate.displayName: The displayed date is formatted based on the locale of the user's browser

requiredField.description: Whether to require the user to enter a value for this field before submitting the form

responseMode.description: When and how to respond to the webhook

onReceived.description: As soon as this node executes

lastNode.description: Returns data of the last-executed node

httpMethod.description: The HTTP method of the Webhook call

responseCode.description: The HTTP Response code to return

responseData.description: What data should be returned. If it should return all items as an array or only the first item as object.

allEntries.description: Returns all the entries of the last node. Always returns an array.

firstEntryJson.description: Returns the JSON data of the first entry of the last node. Always returns a JSON object.

firstEntryBinary.description: Returns the binary data of the first entry of the last node. Always returns a binary file.

responseBinaryPropertyName.description: Name of the binary property to return

limitWaitTime.description: Whether to limit the time this node should wait for a user response before execution resumes

limitType.description: Sets the condition for the execution to resume. Can be a specified date or after some time.

afterTimeInterval.description: Waits for a certain amount of time

atSpecifiedTime.description: Waits until the set date and time to continue

maxDateAndTime.description: Continue execution after the specified date and time

binaryData.description: Whether the webhook will receive binary data

binaryPropertyName.description: The name of the output field to put any binary file data in. Only relevant if binary data is received.

ignoreBots.description: Whether to ignore requests from bots like link previewers and web crawlers

ipWhitelist.description: Comma-separated list of allowed IP addresses. Leave empty to allow all IPs.

noResponseBody.description: Whether to send any body in the response

rawBody.description: Whether to return the raw body

responseContentType.description: Set a custom content-type to return if another one as the "application/json" should be returned

responseHeaders.description: Add headers to the webhook response

responsePropertyName.description: Name of the property to return the data of instead of the whole JSON

webhookSuffix.description: This suffix path will be appended to the restart URL. Helpful when using multiple wait nodes.

appendAttribution.description: Whether to include the link “Form automated with n8n” at the bottom of the form

text.description: Show a response text to the user

redirect.description: Redirect the user to a URL

formSubmittedText.description: The text displayed to users after they fill the form. Leave it empty if don't want to show any additional text.

redirectUrl.description: The URL to redirect users to after they fill the form. Must be a valid URL.

text.description: Show a response text to the user

redirect.description: Redirect the user to a URL

formSubmittedText.description: The text displayed to users after they fill the form. Leave it empty if don't want to show any additional text.

redirectUrl.description: The URL to redirect users to after they fill the form. Must be a valid URL.
